Title: Bohemian Art Print Graphic Hoodie - Yellow Goddess Design
Description:
Embrace bohemian vibes with this vibrant and artistic graphic hoodie. Featuring a striking, colorful portrait inspired by abstract pop art, this hoodie makes a bold statement while offering ultimate comfort.

Crafted from a soft, quality blend, it feels great right out of the package and is perfect for casual outings, festivals, or lounging at home. The vibrant yellow and electric pink tones pop beautifully against the crisp white fabric.

Design Details:

  • Unique Art: Showcases a stylized goddess figure surrounded by energetic, abstract lines and pops of color.
  • Comfort Fit: Designed with an easy-to-wear hoodie fit, offering freedom of movement.
  • Versatile Style: Perfect for festival wear, art lovers, bohemian enthusiasts, or anyone needing a unique wardrobe piece.

Care Instructions: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle, tumble dry low for best results.
